task.title: Configure Application Settings
task.shortdesc: Adjust the weekly time budget, default session duration, and other application preferences using the Settings tab.

step.cmd: In the Weekly budget (hours) spinbox, enter the number of hours you have available for personal projects each week.

info.p: Set this to a number you can reliably achieve, not an aspirational target. The budget is a planning guide, not a quota.

step.cmd: In the Default session duration (minutes) spinbox, enter your typical session length.

info.p: This value pre-fills the duration field when you create a new session. Valid values are 15 to 480 minutes.

step.cmd: In the Log level dropdown, select the logging verbosity.

choices.choice: ERROR — logs only application errors (recommended for daily use).
DEBUG — logs all events including internal state changes (for troubleshooting only).

step.stepresult: Settings are applied immediately. Changes to the weekly budget are reflected in the budget bar on the Sessions tab.

postreq.p: Settings are persisted in ~/.portfolio_manager/config.toml. You can also edit this file directly in a text editor. See for the full list of configuration keys and their valid values.
